criteria: All 11 issues observed during a single human-style Act 1 LLM playtest, source-verified by the orchestrator.
HIGH severity items are Steam-launch blockers (acceptReward crash + {N} placeholder leak + tutorial overload).
MEDIUM/LOW items kept on the board for triage but not gating launch.

issues.title: acceptReward Phaser canvas crash — drawImage on null context
issues.description: On the first reward room of a fresh run, __rrPlay.acceptReward() returned ok:false with message 'Cannot read properties of null (reading drawImage)'. Phaser canvas went black; layout dump showed (no active scenes). Recovery only by direct DOM click on Continue.

bestEvidence.metric: result.json error: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'drawImage')

reproductionSteps: Start a fresh run from the hub
Win the first Floor 1 combat (Index Weaver)
issues.suggestedFix: Null-check canvas/texture context before drawImage in the reward render path; add try/catch + recovery overlay.

issues.title: 1994 facts ship with unresolved {N} placeholders in the answer field
issues.description: data/seed-pack.json contains 1994 facts whose answer field still has {N} template tokens (e.g. 'About {4} grams', '{4000} km'). Verified: grep -E '"(answer|correctAnswer|factAnswer)":\s*"[^"]*\{[0-9]' data/seed-pack.json | wc -l → 1994.

bestEvidence.metric: 1994 facts in seed-pack.json have {N} tokens in answer/correctAnswer/factAnswer

reproductionSteps: Or play any combat where these facts appear and inspect getCombatState().hand[i].factAnswer
issues.suggestedFix: Sweep all deck/seed JSON for /\{[0-9]+\}/ pattern in answer fields. Either bake the substitution at build, or strip placeholders from the source.

issues.title: 8 sequential blocking tutorial popups across 6 turns of first combat
issues.description: First combat fires 8 blocking 'Got it' overlays — enemy intro, Quick Play, Charge, charge feedback, Draw Pile, Discard Pile, AP, Focus Meter. Recent commit cb5e4db18 reduced first-combat popups; the rest leak across the next several turns.
reproductionSteps: Start a fresh run with no prior tutorial flags set
issues.suggestedFix: Cap proactive in-combat popups to ~2-3 in first combat; defer the rest to context-triggered hints.

issues.title: Enemy displayDamage scales upward as player chain multiplier rises
issues.description: Index Weaver's Fang Barrage displayDamage moved 15 → 18 → 21 across turns 3-5 while value field stayed at 6. Either intentional and undocumented, or chain multiplier is leaking into enemy display.

bestEvidence.metric: displayDamage 15 → 18 → 21 with value=6 constant; chain multiplier rising

reproductionSteps: Start a Floor 1 combat against Index Weaver
Build chain multiplier across turns; record getCombatState().enemyIntent
issues.suggestedFix: Audit enemyIntent.displayDamage calc. If multiplier inclusion is intentional, document; otherwise unbind.

issues.title: Shop prices exceed starting gold (50g) on first visit
issues.description: Cards priced 57-73g, relics 150g, vs starting gold 50g. Floor 1 shop is functionally a no-op room.

bestEvidence.metric: Min card price 57g vs starting gold 50g

reproductionSteps: Spawn shopRoom or reach a Floor 1 shop without combat gold
issues.suggestedFix: Guarantee one ≤50g item per Floor 1 shop, or raise starting gold to 60-75g.

issues.title: 'Death keeps 80% (40)' copy on Retreat/Delve screen is grammatically ambiguous
issues.description: RetreatOrDelve.svelte:87 reads 'Death keeps {pct}% ({gold})' — parses as 'the entity Death keeps your money'. Should be 'If you die, you keep 80% (40g)'.
reproductionSteps: Reach the retreatOrDelve screen after any boss
issues.suggestedFix: Rephrase to 'If you die, you keep 80% (40g)'.

issues.title: Retreat/Delve screen lists penalty for delving but no upside
issues.description: Player sees 'Retreat — Keep all 50' vs 'Delve Deeper — Death keeps 80% (40)'. No benefit copy for delving.
issues.suggestedFix: Add a one-line benefit on the Delve button: 'Deeper floors, better rewards, more XP.'

issues.title: FPS drops to 7-14 in extended CombatScene sessions (Docker/SwiftShader)
issues.description: look() reported 'Low FPS alert: 7 fps in CombatScene for 365s' after extended play. Likely software-rendering artifact; verify on real GPU.

bestEvidence.metric: 7 fps in CombatScene for 365s; 14 fps for 123s

reproductionSteps: Run extended CombatScene (>5 min) in Docker SwiftShader
issues.suggestedFix: Profile texture re-registration (Texture key already in use warnings) and overlay particle counts. Verify on real GPU.

issues.title: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED on every session
issues.description: Console error 'Failed to load resource: net::ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED' fires on game boot and map navigation. Non-fatal but indicates a missing graceful fallback for a backend resource.
reproductionSteps: Boot the game in any context where the backend fastify isn't running
issues.suggestedFix: Identify the failing fetch URL; wrap with optional-fallback guard so console stays clean offline.

issues.title: 'Grey Matter 0' on run-end screen has no tooltip or explanation
issues.description: Run end shows 'GREY MATTER 0' with a brain icon but no inline explanation. Source: src/ui/stores/playerData.ts.

bestEvidence.metric: Screenshot combat2-result.rr.jpg shows GREY MATTER 0 with no helper copy

issues.suggestedFix: Add a tooltip or hover description on the Grey Matter row explaining purpose and earn condition.

issues.title: 'Adapt' card description is mechanically vague: 'Auto-picks best: Attack, Block, or Cleanse'
issues.description: cardDescriptionService.ts:1017 returns 'Auto-picks best:\nAttack, Block, or Cleanse'. Player can't tell when it picks or how.
reproductionSteps: Acquire an Adapt card from a mystery event
issues.suggestedFix: Rephrase to 'Becomes Attack, Block, or Cleanse based on combat state when played'.
